rows.label: tev024301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev024301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Wedy about the attack on Earth.

rows.label: tev024301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev024301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Wedy if she has
any interesting news.

rows.label: tev024301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Wedy for her thoughts on the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev024301_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Wedy for her thoughts on the Bias.

rows.label: tev024301_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Wedy what she did
during the enemy attack.

rows.label: tev024301_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Wedy for her thoughts on
the xenoforms living in NLA.

rows.label: tev024301_SEL1021
rows.name:
Ask Wedy if she has
any interesting news.

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0001
rows.name:
The sight of those xeno scum laying
waste to Earth is something I will
never be able to forget.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0002
rows.name:
It took all of a second for their lasers
to wipe my hometown off the map.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0003
rows.name:
When I boarded the White Whale,
I remember thinking that at
least I still had my son.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0004
rows.name:
But he was a soldier who was sent out on
a mission from which he never returned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0005
rows.name:
You're young and strong, so please don't
die. Do whatever it takes to survive![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Do you know Justin? The Companion
in the commercial district? Now
that's a young man you can count on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0009
rows.name:
He asked me if I needed any help,
even though I wasn't in the area
he was assigned to patrol.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0010
rows.name:
He even promised to keep an eye on those
kids across the street who are always making
such a racket in the middle of the night![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0011
rows.name:
What sort of insensitive fool is
throwing loud parties at a time
like this? Can you believe it?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'll have to alert Justin the next
time they get rambunctious...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0017
rows.name:
Did you know that late at night, that girl Lucia
from across the street gathers up groups of suspicious
characters and throws raucous get-togethers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0018
rows.name:
Oh, I understand that when a group of young
girls get together, they can become quite
boisterous. I was young once too, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0019
rows.name:
But she also has those strange
Ma-non xenos coming to her parties![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0020
rows.name:
I don't know if it's supposed to be some sort
of cultural exchange or what, but I do know
that it's extremely dangerous behavior! Hmph![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Xenoforms are all crazed monsters, you know? So
what if they were to go berserk and start murdering
everyone?! I just can't stop thinking about it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Did you know that late at night, that girl Lucia
from across the street gathers groups of suspicious
characters and throws raucous get-togethers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0027
rows.name:
And not only is she inviting over Ma-non, but
those revolting Bias creatures as well! You
simply wouldn't BELIEVE how noisy they can be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Haven't numerous BLADEs lost their
lives to those Bias creatures?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0029
rows.name:
And now that they claim to want our friendship,
we just throw open the gates to the city?
Hmph! How blind can the government be?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0030
rows.name:
If we wait until they give us
a reason to throw them out, it
will already be too late![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0035
rows.name:
I hid myself in my house as
soon as I heard the warning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0036
rows.name:
But that Lucia from across the street pulled
me out of my home—against my will, mind
you—and evacuated me to the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0037
rows.name:
Bah. Like I need filthy
xenos looking after me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0038
rows.name:
Still, I can't believe that girl
would try to save me after how
much I've complained about her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0045
rows.name:
I finally relented to that girl Lucia
from across the street and agreed to
attend one of her late-night...gatherings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0046
rows.name:
She called it her "girl's night,"
but it was more like a xeno
freak show if you ask me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0047
rows.name:
But after talking to them, I could appreciate how they
share our desire to live in peace—despite their
different culture, and attitudes, and...appearances.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG0048
rows.name:
But that Lucia! Worrying so much about an old lady
who never leaves her house after she lost her son...
She really is the biggest busybody in the universe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG1001
rows.name:
Do you know that Companion Justin who
patrolled in the commercial district?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG1002
rows.name:
He always used to come all the way over
here just to make sure I was okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG1003
rows.name:
I was absolutely devastated when
I heard that he was the criminal
behind those terrible incidents![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024301_MSG1004
rows.name:
I guess that just because you're
a fellow human being doesn't
necessarily make you a good person.[ST:wait ]
